---
title: "Prospective students"
---

I welcome enquiries from prospective PhD, Master’s, and exchange students interested in health economics and applied preference research.

## Suitable areas

- Health economics
- Discrete choice experiments
- Behavioural health economics
- Eye tracking and decision processes
- Health technology assessment
- Public health policy preferences
- Vaccine mandate and public health intervention evaluation
- Equity and distributional preferences in health

Please email a CV, academic transcript, brief research proposal, and any relevant publications or writing samples.
